notes: node/rel ids are dense internal ids -- identical on both engines after loading the same sf1.rcpg
f64 dumped as u64 to_bits() patterns (cost_bits); null = unreachable
neighbor_groups: BI Q4 shape -- Forum -HAS_MEMBER-> Person projected (Outgoing IS_LOCATED_IN, Outgoing IS_PART_OF), top_by_size(100, tie=flid); [source_forum_id, largest_cohort_size] in ranked order
fold_via: REPLY_OF folded through neighbor_via(HAS_CREATOR, Outgoing); top 100 [a,b,count] by count desc then (a,b) asc
common_neighbor_counts: sources = 50 smallest Person ids, Direction::Both, KNOWS, targets = all Persons; self-pairs removed; [s,t,count] sorted by (s,t)
aggregate.by_birth_month: aggregate([Person]).by(bmon).sum(pday); [bmon, count, sum_pday] sorted by bmon
aggregate.by_creation_year: aggregate([Post,Comment]).temporal_component(ms, Year) -- Person has no epoch-millis column, so the Year rollup uses Message ms; [year, count, sum] sorted by year
weighted_shortest_path: 10 pairs (persons[i], persons[i+25]) i in 0..10, Direction::Both, KNOWS, weight 1.0
